summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Digital Register HMS Phase 2 features. All 13 new Phase 2 features working perfectly: Remote Cashbox, Shift Handover, Daily WhatsApp Summary, QR Digital Bell, Voice Expense parsing, PDF Invoice generation. Backend APIs 100% functional (30/30 tests passed), frontend UI excellent with all new pages and integrations working flawlessly.
passed_tests: All 30 backend API tests passed (100% success rate)
POST /api/galla/shift-handover - Creates handover and mocks WhatsApp to owner
GET /api/galla/remote - Returns live cashbox data for owner with auto-refresh
GET /api/galla/daily-summary - Generates auto daily summary with WhatsApp
POST /api/qr/request - Creates guest request without auth (PUBLIC endpoint)
GET /api/qr/requests - Returns pending requests for staff
PUT /api/qr/requests/{id} - Resolves guest requests
POST /api/expenses/voice - Parses voice text ('200 rupaye laundry' → ₹200, category: laundry)
GET /api/bookings/{id}/invoice - Returns invoice data for PDF generation
POST /api/bookings/advance - Adds advance payment to bookings
RemoteCashboxPage - Live galla data display with 15s auto-refresh for owner
ShiftHandoverPage - Staff handover form with WhatsApp summary generation
QRBellPage - Guest page (/qr/101) works without authentication
QR request buttons (water, cleaning, towel, bill, other) create requests successfully
StaffRequestsPage - Shows pending QR requests with resolve functionality
GallaPage - Voice expense button and shift handover navigation link
RoomDetailPage - Invoice Print and Add Advance buttons functional
MenuPage - All new Phase 2 navigation items present and working
Language toggle still works perfectly (Marathi ↔ English)
All existing functionality preserved (22-room dashboard, check-in/checkout flows)
Mobile responsive design (QR guest page tested on mobile viewport)
WhatsApp integration (MOCKED) - All messages logged with 'mocked_sent' status
Owner role restrictions working (Remote Cashbox only for owner)
Staff role access working (can access QR requests, shift handover)

success_percentage.integration: 100% (All workflows functional including QR public access)
